_meta.purpose: abstention probes; gold_chunks empty by design

questions.question: Does Kibuga ship internationally to Kenya, and what are the rates?
questions.why_absent: Corpus covers returns/privacy/seller terms; no international shipping clause. 'International' appears only re: data transfers.

questions.question: Can I pay for my order in instalments or with cash on delivery?
questions.why_absent: No payment-method or instalment/COD clause anywhere in the 5 documents.

questions.question: What is the warranty period in months on electronics bought from Kibuga?
questions.why_absent: Sellers give a warranty (Q17) but no PERIOD/duration in months is stated.

questions.question: Does Kibuga have a physical store I can visit in Kampala?
questions.why_absent: Registered office address exists (Q23) but no retail/physical-store clause.

questions.question: What loyalty points or discount codes does Kibuga offer repeat buyers?
How many days does delivery take after I place an order?
questions.why_absent: Return pickup is 2 working days (Q06); outbound DELIVERY time is never stated.
